description: Scene-varied variants of the remaining camera-motion types (dolly_in/out, pan L/R, tilt_up, orbit, drone, zoom_in, descend). CAMERA-motion sentence kept verbatim from camera_motion_t2v.json; only scene/subject changed. 2 variants per type.
negative_prompt: static shot, fixed camera, no camera movement, jitter, blurry, distorted, low quality, text, watermark

prompts.prompt: The camera slowly dollies forward, pushing in toward a lone lighthouse at the end of a rocky pier under a grey sky. Smooth steady camera motion moving straight ahead, waves crashing below. Cinematic, photorealistic.

The camera slowly dollies forward, pushing in toward an ornate wooden door at the end of a candle-lit hallway. Smooth steady camera motion moving straight ahead, shadows flickering on the walls. Cinematic, photorealistic.

The camera slowly pulls back, dollying away from a lone astronaut standing on a red rocky plain, gradually revealing more of the vast Martian desert. Smooth backward camera motion. Cinematic, photorealistic.

The camera slowly pulls back, dollying away from a street musician playing guitar on a corner, gradually revealing more of the busy city sidewalk. Smooth backward camera motion. Cinematic, photorealistic.

The camera pans smoothly to the left across a row of colorful beach houses along the shore, sweeping past each facade one after another. Steady horizontal rotation of the camera. Cinematic, photorealistic.
The camera pans smoothly to the left across a snowy mountain ridge line, sweeping past the jagged peaks one after another. Steady horizontal rotation of the camera. Cinematic, photorealistic.
The camera pans smoothly to the right across a long art gallery wall hung with framed paintings, sweeping past each painting. Steady horizontal camera rotation. Cinematic, photorealistic.
The camera pans smoothly to the right across a harbor lined with fishing boats at dawn, sweeping past the moored boats. Steady horizontal camera rotation. Cinematic, photorealistic.
The camera tilts upward from the base of a towering waterfall, slowly craning its view up the cascading water toward the cliff top. Smooth vertical camera tilt. Cinematic, photorealistic.
The camera tilts upward from the foot of a gothic cathedral, slowly craning its view up the stone facade toward the spires. Smooth vertical camera tilt. Cinematic, photorealistic.

The camera orbits in a smooth circular arc around a marble statue of a warrior in a museum hall, revealing it from every angle as the camera circles. Steady 360 orbiting camera motion. Cinematic, photorealistic.

The camera orbits in a smooth circular arc around a steaming bowl of ramen on a wooden table, revealing it from every angle as the camera circles. Steady 360 orbiting camera motion. Cinematic, photorealistic.

An aerial drone shot flies forward over a dense tropical rainforest canopy with a waterfall, the camera gliding steadily ahead high above the landscape. Smooth forward aerial camera motion. Cinematic, photorealistic.
An aerial drone shot flies forward over a coastal city skyline at sunset, the camera gliding steadily ahead high above the landscape. Smooth forward aerial camera motion. Cinematic, photorealistic.

The camera slowly zooms in on a hummingbird hovering at a flower, the framing tightening steadily until its wings fill the frame. Smooth optical zoom-in, background unchanged. Cinematic, photorealistic.

The camera slowly zooms in on a vintage pocket watch resting on a desk, the framing tightening steadily until its dial fills the frame. Smooth optical zoom-in, background unchanged. Cinematic, photorealistic.

The camera descends straight down from above toward a circular hedge maze in a garden, smoothly lowering into a top-down bird's-eye view of the maze. Steady downward craning camera motion. Cinematic, photorealistic.

The camera descends straight down from above toward a busy roundabout with cars, smoothly lowering into a top-down bird's-eye view of the traffic. Steady downward craning camera motion. Cinematic, photorealistic.
